media.alt_text: Culturelle Probiotics packaging with yellow and purple design on a white background

variants.title: Culturelle® Digestive Daily Probiotic

description.plain: From the manufacturer's website: Culturelle® Digestive Daily Probiotic Capsules supplement contains naturally sourced ingredients that work with your body to support digestive health.* Ingredients like the proven probiotic strain, Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG (LGG®), are shown to help your digestive system work better.* Benefits Helps with occasional diarrhea, gas and bloating* Helps your digestive system work better* Vegetarian (gelatin-free) probiotic capsules Culturelle® Digestive Daily Probiotic Capsules delivers 10 billion live active cultures of LGG®, the most clinically studied probiotic strain††, to help your digestive system work better, along with the prebiotic inulin.* *These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. These products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Warning: KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Inform a healthcare professional before starting any dietary supplement, particularly if there is a known immune-compromised condition. ﻿Recommended use: ﻿Directions for 12 years of age and older: For daily use, take one (1) capsule per day. For optimal results, daily use is suggested. If experiencing occasional digestive upset, two (2) capsules daily [take one (1) in the morning and one (1) at night] until discomfort subsides. When traveling, take two (2) capsules daily [one (1) in the morning and one (1) at night] throughout the trip. For best results start two to three days prior to travel.

media.alt_text: Culturelle® Three-in-One Complete Probiotic Capsules

variants.title: Culturelle® Three-in-One Complete Probiotic Capsules

description.plain: With Culturelle Three-in-One Complete, you get more than just a probiotic – you get daily support for three vital areas of health, in one convenient capsule. Supports heart health: Omega-3 fatty acids work to promote cardiovascular wellness and overall heart function. Aids digestive balance: Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG, one of the most clinically studied probiotics, supports healthy digestion and helps ease occasional digestive upset. Strengthens immune defenses: Because 70% of your immune system resides in the gut, Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG also helps maintain your body's natural defenses right at the core. There are 30 once-daily capsules in a convenient bottle.

media.alt_text: Culturelle Culturelle Digestive Health Daily Probiotic Capsules Vitamins & Supplements

variants.title: Culturelle Digestive Health Daily Probiotic Capsules

description.plain: Keep your digestive system in balance with Culturelle Digestive Health. Each capsule contains 10 billion live active cultures of Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG, a clinically proven strain that helps restore the natural balance of good bacteria in your gut. This daily supplement is designed to alleviate occasional digestive upset, including diarrhea, gas, and bloating, while also supporting a strong immune system (where 70% of your immunity resides). The capsules are individually blister-packed to ensure potency without the need for refrigeration, making them perfect for travel and daily use.

media.alt_text: Culturelle Digestive Health Daily Probiotic 30 Capsules

variants.title: Culturelle Digestive Health Daily Probiotic 30 Capsules

description.plain: PROVEN EFFECTIVE – Culturelle Digestive Health Daily Probiotic Capsules are powered Lactobacillus rhamnosus (LGG). LGG is the proven effective and clinically studied probiotic strain. LGG helps your digestive system work better. DAILY DIGESTIVE HEALTH * – LGG is naturally sourced and scientifically proven to work in harmony with your body to keep your digestive system in balance.* Helps with occasional digestive upset; including diarrhea, gas and bloating.* For daily use, take 1 vegetarian capsule per day NO REFRIGERATION REQUIRED –Every package of Culturelle meets the highest standards for purity and potency when consumed - not just when we make it. To preserve the billions of CFU’s (colony-forming units) in your Culturelle, store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight SAFE AND EFFECTIVE – Over 1,000 scientific studies and 30 years of research have demonstrated the safety and efficacy of LGG probiotics. Culturelle is vegetarian and contains no gluten, milk, soy, wheat or preservatives PROBIOTIC POWER – The doctors that discovered LGG found that it is strong enough to survive stomach acids and successfully set up shop in the intestines

media.alt_text: Digestive Daily Probiotic by Culturelle® – Gut Health, Bloating & Digestive Support | 30 Capsules

variants.title: Digestive Daily Probiotic by Culturelle® – Gut Health, Bloating & Digestive Support | 30 Capsules

description.plain: KEY BENEFITS • Helps reduce bloating, gas, and occasional diarrhea • Supports healthy digestion and gut balance • Helps reduce risk of antibiotic-associated diarrhea • Supports immune and gastrointestinal health WHAT IT IS / WHAT IT DOES Digestive Daily Probiotic by Culturelle® provides 10 billion CFU of Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG (LGG), one of the most clinically studied probiotic strains. This daily probiotic helps support digestive balance, gut health, and immune function, while helping manage occasional digestive discomfort such as bloating, gas, and diarrhea. FEATURES • Contains Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG (LGG) • Provides 10 billion CFU per capsule • Clinically studied probiotic strain with extensive research • Helps support digestive and immune health • No refrigeration required • Gluten-free and vegetarian • Suitable for daily use • NPN: 80011341 INGREDIENTS Medicinal Ingredients (Per Capsule) Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG — 10 billion CFU Non-Medicinal Ingredients (As per manufacturer formulation) RECOMMENDED DOSE Adults and children (12+): • Take 1 capsule daily • For travel: take 2 capsules daily (morning and evening) • During antibiotic use: take 1 capsule twice daily, continue for 10 days after completion • Continued use is recommended CAUTIONS / WARNINGS • Keep out of reach of children • Consult a healthcare practitioner prior to use if immunocompromised • Mild digestive changes (gas or bloating) may occur initially • Consult a healthcare practitioner if symptoms persist beyond 2 weeks PAIR WITH • Digestive enzymes for enhanced digestion • Fibre supplements for gut health • Immune support supplements Culturelle® Digestive Daily Probiotic provides clinically studied Lactobacillus GG to support digestive health, reduce bloating, and promote gut balance.

media.alt_text: Digestive Daily Probiotic by Culturelle® – Gut Health, Bloating & Digestive Support | 30 Capsules
